blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 160 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 53°F.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
